overview: Audit REST API for the NetApp Console

ai-gen.title: Retrieve an Audit service account record
ai-gen.summary: Retrieve account records using a specified account public ID.
ai-gen.keywords: account records,audit records,account public ID,netapp console,user token,accountId,fromLastModified,toLastModified,qAction,qService
ai-gen.lead: Retrieves account records by a specified account public ID so you can review account details within the Audit service API.

ai-gen.title: Retrieve an Audit service API record by account
ai-gen.summary: Retrieve records for a specific account, service, and request ID.
ai-gen.keywords: audit records,account records,service records,request records,netapp console,netapp ontap,account service,request id,record retrieval
ai-gen.lead: The endpoint retrieves specified records by account, service, and request ID, allowing you to access detailed audit information for analysis and tracking purposes.

ai-gen.title: Retrieve an Audit Service API filter option
ai-gen.summary: Retrieve filter options using the specified account ID.
ai-gen.keywords: audit options,account filter,filter options,account id,netapp console,user token,retrieve options
ai-gen.lead: Retrieves filter options for audit logs by a specified account ID, allowing you to customize which audit events are captured and reviewed.
